versions.version_description: Kenny Loggins was born in Everett,Washington and was greatly known for his soundtrack songs ,most notably Footloose 1984 ,Top gun with Danger Zone 1986 and Nobody,s Fool from Caddyshack 2 1988 .You Tube link to this song https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=U8SSdyflGN4 Which users may find easier to play with capo on 3rd fret tranpose these chords - 3.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
CHORDS:

[ch]Gm7[/ch]       353333               [ch]Dm7[/ch]      xx0211
[ch]Fmaj7[/ch]/[ch]G[/ch]   3x3555               [ch]Cm7[/ch]      x35343 AND 353333
[ch]Fmaj9[/ch]     xx3553               [ch]Cm9[/ch]      x31333
F#o7      xx4545               [ch]C9[/ch]       x32333
[ch]Em7[/ch]       022030               [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]    x13231
[ch]Eb[/ch]        xx1343               [ch]Ebmaj9[/ch]   xx1331 
[ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]    xx1333               [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]   x13231
[ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]/[ch]F[/ch]  1x1333               [ch]Bmaj9[/ch]    6x756X
[ch]Eb13[/ch]+11   x6x6108              [ch]Bb[/ch]/[ch]C[/ch]     x3x331
Eo7       xx2323               [ch]Am7[/ch]      x02010
[ch]Eb[/ch]/[ch]F[/ch]      xx3343               [ch]Am7[/ch](b5)  5x554x
[ch]Dm9[/ch]       x53555               [ch]Ab7[/ch](b5)  2x231x
[ch]D7[/ch]        xx0212               [ch]F[/ch]        133211
[ch]Gsus[/ch]      3x0013               [ch]G[/ch]        3x0003
[ch]Abmaj7[/ch]    4x554x               [ch]D7+5[/ch]     xx0312








INTRO: [ch]Gm7[/ch]

VERSE:

[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]                                [ch]Eb[/ch]
 There have been times in my life, I've spent wondering why[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]          [ch]Dm7[/ch]        [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]     Eo7        [ch]Eb[/ch]/[ch]F[/ch]
 Still somehow I believed,   we'd always survive[/tab]

[tab]F#o7            [ch]Gm7[/ch]
 Now I'm not so sure, [/tab]

[tab]                         [ch]Eb[/ch]
 You're waiting to hear, One good reason to try[/tab]

[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]   [ch]Cm7[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]        [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]         Eo7           [ch]Eb[/ch]/[ch]F[/ch]  F#o7
 Lord what more can I say,   What's left to provide[/tab]


PRE-CHORUS:

[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]   [ch]C9[/ch]        [ch]Fmaj9[/ch]      [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch](b5)
 You think that maybe it's over[/tab]

[tab][ch]E13[/ch]+11       [ch]Bbmaj9[/ch]     [ch]Am7[/ch](b5)    
 Only if you want it to be[/tab]

[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]            [ch]Bb[/ch]/[ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]   
 Are you gonna wait for your sign,   your miracle[/tab]

[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]/[ch]C[/ch]     [ch]Am7[/ch]     [ch]Dm7[/ch]
  Or stand up and fight[/tab]


CHORUS:

[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]     [ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]Cm9[/ch]

[tab]            [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]/[ch]F[/ch]          [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]         
  This is it,[/tab]
            Your back's to the corner

[tab]            [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]/[ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch] 
  This is it,  [/tab]
           Don't be a fool anymore

[tab]            [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]/[ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]
  This is it,  [/tab]
            The waiting is over


VERSE:

[tab][ch]Am7[/ch](b5) [ch]Ab7[/ch](b5) [ch]Gm7[/ch]    
 No     room to run, No way to hide[/tab]

[tab]    [ch]Eb[/ch]           
 No time for wondering why[/tab]

[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]   [ch]Cm7[/ch]      [ch]Dm7[/ch]          [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
 It's here, The moment is now[/tab]

[tab]Eo7           [ch]Eb[/ch]
 About to decide[/tab]

[tab]F#o7         [ch]Gm7[/ch] 
 Let him believe or leave him behind[/tab]

[tab]     [ch]Eb[/ch]      
 But keep me near in your heart[/tab]

[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]Cm7[/ch]       [ch]Dm7[/ch]       [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]

[tab]     Eo7            [ch]Eb[/ch]/[ch]F[/ch]  F#o7
 I'm here by your side[/tab]
